En una cacerola, agrega la quinoa lavada y el caldo de verduras suficiente como para cubrirla por completo.
Cocina a fuego alto hasta que empiece a hervir. En este punto, baja la temperatura y cuece la quinoa a fuego lento por 10 minutos con la olla tapada.

Once the garlic is slightly golden, add the crockery to the frying pan, add a tablespoon of vegetable stock and paddle for about 6 minutes.
All this is done at the same time as the cooking of quinoa, and do not care and check if more bald is necessary. Can't get dry.
After 6 minutes more, add a fresh chopped spinach and a cup of white wine.
After about 13 minutes, add half of your frying pan to the quinoa pot and book the other half.
It puts half that you have booked in a bowl and cuts the ingredients to get a smooth and creamy salsa, ideal to complete the regan quinoa risotto.
Add to the quinoa salsa, let cook 2 minutes while stirring and put out the fire.
